mapper.select: /* UsimOrdAddrMapper.getOrgIdComboList */ SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID AS VALUE , ORG_NM AS TEXT FROM MDS_AGNT_INFO BB WHERE BB.CONT_MCTG_CRCLT_CH_CD = 'E0200' /* 계약채널(중) - 특수*/ AND BB.CONT_CRCLT_CH_CD = 'E0211' /* 계약채널(소) - 특판(B2B)*/ ORDER BY 1

/* UsimOrdAddrMapper.getOrgIdComboList */ SELECT DISTINCT B.ORGN_ID AS VALUE , C.ORGN_NM AS TEXT FROM CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST a , CMN_USR_MST b , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST C WHERE a.USR_ID = b.USR_ID (+) AND B.ORGN_ID = C.ORGN_ID (+) AND B.USG_YN <> 'N' AND a.GRP_ID = 'G-PSCM2M' ORDER BY C.ORGN_NM
